title: Audit ferrolearn-preprocess vs sklearn (preprocessing + impute + feature_extraction + feature_selection): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 7 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Largest API surface. Scope: sklearn.preprocessing (~25 transformers + stateless functions), sklearn.impute (SimpleImputer, IterativeImputer, KNNImputer, MissingIndicator), sklearn.feature_extraction (DictVectorizer, FeatureHasher, text vectorizers, image patches), sklearn.feature_selection (~13 selectors).

Related existing issues: #103 (GenericUnivariateSelect), #110 (HashingVectorizer), #111 (DictVectorizer), #112 (FeatureHasher), #113 (MissingIndicator), #114 (KernelCenterer — may belong in kernel crate), #115 (stateless preprocessing functions)
